    </section>

    <section class="strategic-section" id="security">
        <div class="hero-bg-layers">
            <div class="hero-grain"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="strategic-left-glow"></div>
        <!-- Semicircular Orbits at the edge - ENLARGED -->
        <div class="edge-orbit-container expanded-orbit">
            <div class="orbit-circle orbit-0"></div>
            <div class="orbit-circle orbit-1">
                <div class="orbit-node" style="top: 20%; left: 80%"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="orbit-circle orbit-2">
                <div class="orbit-node" style="top: 50%; left: 0%"></div>
                <div class="orbit-node" style="top: 30%; left: 95%"></div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="container">
            <div class="section-header">
                <h2 data-i18n="strategic_title">Why Encrypted eSign Is a <span>Strategic Asset</span></h2>
                <p data-i18n="strategic_subtitle">Encrypted eSign determines who owns the contract when something goes
                    wrong. eSign is built so that ownership stays with the enterprise, not the vendor</p>
            </div>

            <div class="strategic-dynamic-content">
                <div class="strategic-cards-stack" id="strategicCardStack">
                    <!-- Card 1: Integrity -->
                    <div class="strategic-card active" data-index="0">
                        <div class="strat-content">
                            <h3 data-i18n="strategic_card_1_title">End-to-End Document Integrity</h3>
                            <p data-i18n="strategic_card_1_text">Every document and signature is cryptographically
                                sealed so
                                any change whether intentional or accidental is immediately detectable.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Card 2: Storage -->
                    <div class="strategic-card" data-index="1">
                        <div class="strat-content">
                            <h3 data-i18n="strategic_card_2_title">Decentralized Document Storage</h3>
                            <p data-i18n="strategic_card_2_text">By design, eSign distributes document storage to
                                prevent
                                single points of control, limiting operational, regulatory, and vendor-related risk for
                                enterprises.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Card 3: Non-Repudiation -->
                    <div class="strategic-card" data-index="2">
                        <div class="strat-content">
                            <h3 data-i18n="strategic_card_3_title">Strong Non-Repudiation</h3>
                            <p data-i18n="strategic_card_3_text">Signatures are bound to the signer, the document, and
                                the
                                moment of signing, creating proof that stands up in audits and disputes.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Card 4: Identity -->
                    <div class="strategic-card" data-index="3">
                        <div class="strat-content">
                            <h3 data-i18n="strategic_card_4_title">Sovereign Signer Identity Layer</h3>
                            <p data-i18n="strategic_card_4_text">eSign establishes signer identity through decentralized
                                identifiers, enabling proof of authority or eligibility without collecting or retaining
                                excess personal data.</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="strategic-visual-showcase" id="strategicVisualShowcase">
                    <!-- Visual 1: Integrity Showcase (The Vault) -->
                    <div class="visual-item active" data-index="0">
                        <div class="hub-window">
                            <div class="hub-sidebar">
                                <div class="hub-sidebar-icon active"><i class="fas fa-shield-halved"></i></div>
                                <div class="hub-sidebar-icon"><i class="fas fa-layer-group"></i></div>
                                <div class="hub-sidebar-icon"><i class="fas fa-clock-rotate-left"></i></div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="hub-content">
                                <div class="hub-tab">Document Integrity Vault</div>
                                <div class="hub-list">
                                    <div class="hub-item" style="--delay: 0.1s">
                                        <div class="hub-item-icon" style="color: #00d2ff"><i
                                                class="fas fa-file-invoice"></i></div>
                                        <div class="hub-item-info">
                                            <div class="hub-item-name">Corporate_Charter_Final.pdf</div>
                                            <div class="hub-progress-bar">
                                                <div class="hub-progress-fill" style="width: 100%"></div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="hub-item-status status-sealed"><i class="fas fa-check"></i></div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="hub-item" style="--delay: 0.2s">
                                        <div class="hub-item-icon" style="color: #00d2ff"><i
                                                class="fas fa-file-signature"></i></div>
                                        <div class="hub-item-info">
                                            <div class="hub-item-name">Executive_Agreement_V2.pdf</div>
                                            <div class="hub-progress-bar">
                                                <div class="hub-progress-fill" style="width: 100%"></div>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="hub-item-status status-sealed"><i class="fas fa-check"></i></div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="hub-vault-container">
                            <div class="vault-door">
                                <div class="vault-wheel"><i class="fas fa-gear"></i></div>
                                <div class="vault-status">LOCKED</div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="vault-scanner-light"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Visual 2: Storage Showcase (The Cluster) -->
                    <div class="visual-item" data-index="1">
                        <div class="hub-window">
                            <div class="hub-sidebar">
                                <div class="hub-sidebar-icon"><i class="fas fa-server"></i></div>
                                <div class="hub-sidebar-icon active"><i class="fas fa-network-wired"></i></div>
                                <div class="hub-sidebar-icon"><i class="fas fa-microchip"></i></div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="hub-content">
                                <div class="hub-tab">Decentralized Node Cluster</div>
                                <div class="hub-node-map">
                                    <div class="hub-node"><i class="fas fa-satellite"></i></div>
                                    <div class="hub-node-line" style="transform: rotate(30deg)"></div>
                                    <div class="hub-node-line" style="transform: rotate(-30deg)"></div>
                                    <div class="hub-item"
                                        style="position: absolute; bottom: 0; width: 100%; --delay: 0.3s">
                                        <div class="hub-item-icon" style="color: #a855f7"><i class="fas fa-server"></i>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="hub-item-info">
                                            <div class="hub-item-name">Primary Shard Cluster</div>
                                            <div class="hub-item-date">Healthy • 12 Global Regions</div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="hub-mac-mockup">
                            <div class="mac-header">
                                <div class="mac-notch"></div>
                                <div class="mac-controls"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="mac-screen-content">
                                <div class="cloud-dashboard">
                                    <div class="cloud-row">
                                        <div class="cloud-box"><i class="fas fa-database"></i></div>
                                        <div class="cloud-box"><i class="fas fa-server"></i></div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="cloud-loader"></div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <!-- Extra Environmental Elements -->
                            <div class="floating-data-shard shard-1"></div>
                            <div class="floating-data-shard shard-2"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Visual 3: Non-Repudiation Showcase (The Ledger) -->
                    <div class="visual-item" data-index="2">
                        <div class="hub-window">
                            <div class="hub-sidebar">
                                <div class="hub-sidebar-icon"><i class="fas fa-list-check"></i></div>
                                <div class="hub-sidebar-icon active"><i class="fas fa-signature"></i></div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="hub-content">
                                <div class="hub-tab">Immutable Trust Ledger</div>
                                <div class="hub-ledger">
                                    <div class="hub-ledger-step" style="--delay: 0.1s">
                                        <div class="hub-item-name">Biometric Auth Verified</div>
                                        <div class="hub-item-date">Signer Identity confirmed via DID</div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="hub-ledger-step" style="--delay: 0.2s">
                                        <div class="hub-item-name">Cryptographic Anchor</div>
                                        <div class="hub-item-date">Block Ref: #18,442,109</div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="hub-holo-crystal">
                            <div class="crystal-core">
                                <div class="crystal-face front"></div>
                                <div class="crystal-face back"></div>
                                <div class="crystal-face left"></div>
                                <div class="crystal-face right"></div>
                                <div class="crystal-face top"></div>
                                <div class="crystal-face bottom"></div>
                                <div class="crystal-data-stream"></div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="holo-base"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Visual 4: Identity Showcase (The Shield) -->
                    <div class="visual-item" data-index="3">
                        <div class="hub-window">
                            <div class="hub-sidebar">
                                <div class="hub-sidebar-icon active"><i class="fas fa-id-card"></i></div>
                                <div class="hub-sidebar-icon"><i class="fas fa-fingerprint"></i></div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="hub-content">
                                <div class="hub-tab">Self-Sovereign Identity</div>
                                <div class="hub-id-grid">
                                    <div class="hub-item" style="--delay: 0.1s">
                                        <div class="hub-item-info">
                                            <div class="hub-item-name">Sovereign DID Masking</div>
                                            <div class="hub-item-date">Protects PII data from exposure</div>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="hub-item-status status-verified"><i class="fas fa-toggle-on"></i>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="hub-item" style="--delay: 0.2s">
                                        <div class="hub-item-info">
                                            <div class="hub-item-name">Zero-Knowledge Proof</div>
                                            <div class="hub-item-date">Verifies age/status without identity</div>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="hub-item-status status-verified"><i class="fas fa-toggle-on"></i>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="hub-phone-mockup">
                            <div class="phone-screen">
                                <div class="phone-status-dot"></div>
                                <div class="phone-header">
                                    <div class="phone-notch"></div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="phone-content phone-identity">
                                    <div class="bio-auth-ui">
                                        <div class="auth-ring"></div>
                                        <div class="auth-finger"><i class="fas fa-fingerprint"></i></div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="auth-success-badge">VERIFIED</div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <!-- Projection outside phone -->
                            <div class="holo-id-projection">
                                <i class="fas fa-id-card"></i>
                                <div class="scan-line"></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <section class="scenarios-section" id="features">
        <div class="scenarios-sticky-wrapper" id="scenarioWrapper">

            <div class="sticky-content">
                <div class="scenario-bg-overlay"></div>
                <div class="container">
                    <div class="scenario-header">
                        <h2>Operational Trust that extends <br>beyond the <span>Signing Moment</span></h2>
                        <p class="scenario-subheader">Your documents don't stop mattering once they're signed. <br>With
                            BrillSign, they remain cryptographically verifiable and legally defensible—forever.
                        </p>
                        <div class="scenario-tabs" id="scenarioTabs">
                            <div class="tab active" data-index="0">Audit Trails</div>
                            <div class="tab" data-index="1">Compliance</div>
                            <div class="tab" data-index="2">Zero-Knowledge</div>
                            <div class="tab" data-index="3">Jurisdiction</div>
                            <div class="tab" data-index="4">Identity</div>
                            <div class="tab" data-index="5">Exit-Safe</div>
                            <div class="nav-marker"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="scenario-visual-container">
                        <div class="scenario-visual-track" id="scenarioVisuals">
                            <div class="scenario-slide active" id="slide-0">
                                <p class="scenario-caption">
                                    <strong>Tamper-Proof Audit Trails</strong>
                                    Every action is cryptographically sealed the moment it occurs, no silent edits, no
                                    retroactive changes, no ambiguity. When regulators, auditors, or legal teams examine
                                    your records, the integrity is mathematically provable, not just promised.
                                </p>
                                <div class="mockup-frame">
                                    <img src="scenario_audit_trails.png" alt="Digital Audit Dashboard">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="scenario-slide" id="slide-1">
                                <p class="scenario-caption">
                                    <strong>Compliance Built Into the Workflow</strong>
                                    Compliance isn't a checklist, it's embedded in the architecture. Data residency,
                                    retention policies, and access controls are enforced automatically as documents flow
                                    through your organization, eliminating human error and reducing the daily compliance
                                    burden on your teams.
                                </p>
                                <div class="mockup-frame">
                                    <img src="scenario_compliance.png" alt="Corporate Compliance">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="scenario-slide" id="slide-2">
                                <p class="scenario-caption">
                                    <strong>Zero-Knowledge Data Handling</strong>
                                    We're architecturally incapable of reading your documents, by design, not by policy.
                                    This eliminates insider threats, internal exposure, and vendor-trust dependencies
                                    entirely. Your confidential data remains yours, cryptographically sealed from
                                    everyone, including us.
                                </p>
                                <div class="mockup-frame">
                                    <img src="scenario_zero_knowledge.png" alt="Secure Encryption">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="scenario-slide" id="slide-3">
                                <p class="scenario-caption">
                                    <strong>Jurisdiction-Aware Signing</strong>
                                    As documents cross borders, signing workflows adapt automatically to meet local
                                    regulatory requirements, GDPR in Europe, eIDAS compliance, or region-specific
                                    mandates. You avoid compliance gaps without bottlenecking transactions or escalating
                                    every deal to legal review.
                                </p>
                                <div class="mockup-frame">
                                    <img src="scenario_jurisdiction.png" alt="Global Jurisdiction Map">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="scenario-slide" id="slide-4">
                                <p class="scenario-caption">
                                    <strong>Privacy-Preserving Identity Verification</strong>
                                    Identity verification happens without surveillance, behavioral tracking, or
                                    persistent user profiles. You get cryptographic certainty about who signed, without
                                    creating privacy risks, regulatory liabilities, or long-term data exposure for your
                                    signers.
                                </p>
                                <div class="mockup-frame">
                                    <img src="scenario_identity.png" alt="Secure Identity Check">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="scenario-slide" id="slide-5">
                                <p class="scenario-caption">
                                    <strong>Exit-Safe Architecture</strong>
                                    Your documents outlive any vendor relationship. If you migrate platforms or
                                    your needs evolve, every signature remains independently verifiable without
                                    re-signing contracts or maintaining our service. Legal validity is
                                    permanent, not contingent on our existence.
                                </p>
                                <div class="mockup-frame">
                                    <img src="scenario_exit_safe.png" alt="Secure Data Vault">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <section class="user-testimonials-v2" id="testimonials">
        <span id="pricing" style="position: absolute; top: -100px;"></span>

        <div class="container">
            <div class="testimonials-v3-header">
                <div class="header-left">
                    <span class="test-badge" data-i18n="test_title">Experiences worth hearing from</span>
                    <h2 data-i18n="test_highlight">eSign turns signatures into <span>defensible records</span>.</h2>
                    <p data-i18n="test_subtitle">Every document remains verifiable, compliant, and ready for scrutiny
                        when it matters most.</p>
                </div>
            </div>


            <div class="testimonial-v2-track-wrapper">
                <div class="testimonial-v2-track" id="testimonialV2Track">
                    <!-- Testimonial Card 1 -->
                    <div class="testimonial-v2-card">
                        <div class="quote-icon">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="40" height="40">
                                <path fill="currentColor"
                                    d="M14.017 21L14.017 18C14.017 16.8954 14.9124 16 16.017 16H19.017C19.5693 16 20.017 15.5523 20.017 15V9C20.017 8.44772 19.5693 8 19.017 8H16.017C14.9124 8 14.017 7.10457 14.017 6V3H21.017V15C21.017 18.3137 18.3307 21 15.017 21H14.017ZM3 21L3 18C3 16.8954 3.89543 16 5 16H8C8.55228 16 9 15.5523 9 15V9C9 8.44772 8.55228 8 8 8H5C3.89543 8 3 7.10457 3 6V3H10V15C10 18.3137 7.31371 21 4 21H3Z" />
                            </svg>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="test_card_1_quote">"We stopped thinking about signatures as a workflow and
                            started treating them as evidence."</h3>
                        <p class="role">Chief Compliance Officer</p>
                        <p class="text" data-i18n="test_card_1_text">BrillSign gave us confidence that every signed
                            document would still hold up months or years later.</p>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Testimonial Card 2 -->
                    <div class="testimonial-v2-card">
                        <div class="quote-icon">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="40" height="40">
                                <path fill="currentColor"
                                    d="M14.017 21L14.017 18C14.017 16.8954 14.9124 16 16.017 16H19.017C19.5693 16 20.017 15.5523 20.017 15V9C20.017 8.44772 19.5693 8 19.017 8H16.017C14.9124 8 14.017 7.10457 14.017 6V3H21.017V15C21.017 18.3137 18.3307 21 15.017 21H14.017ZM3 21L3 18C3 16.8954 3.89543 16 5 16H8C8.55228 16 9 15.5523 9 15V9C9 8.44772 8.55228 8 8 8H5C3.89543 8 3 7.10457 3 6V3H10V15C10 18.3137 7.31371 21 4 21H3Z" />
                            </svg>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="test_card_2_quote">"Audit reviews went from reactive to routine."</h3>
                        <p class="role">Legal Ops Manager</p>
                        <p class="text" data-i18n="test_card_2_text">With immutable logs and enforced policies, our team
                            no longer has to chase records during audits.</p>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Testimonial Card 3 -->
                    <div class="testimonial-v2-card">
                        <div class="quote-icon">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="40" height="40">
                                <path fill="currentColor"
                                    d="M14.017 21L14.017 18C14.017 16.8954 14.9124 16 16.017 16H19.017C19.5693 16 20.017 15.5523 20.017 15V9C20.017 8.44772 19.5693 8 19.017 8H16.017C14.9124 8 14.017 7.10457 14.017 6V3H21.017V15C21.017 18.3137 18.3307 21 15.017 21H14.017ZM3 21L3 18C3 16.8954 3.89543 16 5 16H8C8.55228 16 9 15.5523 9 15V9C9 8.44772 8.55228 8 8 8H5C3.89543 8 3 7.10457 3 6V3H10V15C10 18.3137 7.31371 21 4 21H3Z" />
                            </svg>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="test_card_3_quote">"The biggest value wasn’t speed, it was certainty."</h3>
                        <p class="role">VP of Product</p>
                        <p class="text" data-i18n="test_card_3_text">Knowing documents can’t be altered removed a class
                            of legal risk we were previously accepting.</p>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Testimonial Card 4 -->
                    <div class="testimonial-v2-card">
                        <div class="quote-icon">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="40" height="40">
                                <path fill="currentColor"
                                    d="M14.017 21L14.017 18C14.017 16.8954 14.9124 16 16.017 16H19.017C19.5693 16 20.017 15.5523 20.017 15V9C20.017 8.44772 19.5693 8 19.017 8H16.017C14.9124 8 14.017 7.10457 14.017 6V3H21.017V15C21.017 18.3137 18.3307 21 15.017 21H14.017ZM3 21L3 18C3 16.8954 3.89543 16 5 16H8C8.55228 16 9 15.5523 9 15V9C9 8.44772 8.55228 8 8 8H5C3.89543 8 3 7.10457 3 6V3H10V15C10 18.3137 7.31371 21 4 21H3Z" />
                            </svg>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="test_card_4_quote">"We reduced vendor trust without increasing operational
                            friction."</h3>
                        <p class="role">Enterprise Architect</p>
                        <p class="text" data-i18n="test_card_4_text">BrillSign let us keep control of keys and data
                            while still supporting enterprise signing workflows.</p>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Testimonial Card 5 -->
                    <div class="testimonial-v2-card">
                        <div class="quote-icon">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="40" height="40">
                                <path fill="currentColor"
                                    d="M14.017 21L14.017 18C14.017 16.8954 14.9124 16 16.017 16H19.017C19.5693 16 20.017 15.5523 20.017 15V9C20.017 8.44772 19.5693 8 19.017 8H16.017C14.9124 8 14.017 7.10457 14.017 6V3H21.017V15C21.017 18.3137 18.3307 21 15.017 21H14.017ZM3 21L3 18C3 16.8954 3.89543 16 5 16H8C8.55228 16 9 15.5523 9 15V9C9 8.44772 8.55228 8 8 8H5C3.89543 8 3 7.10457 3 6V3H10V15C10 18.3137 7.31371 21 4 21H3Z" />
                            </svg>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="test_card_5_quote">"Cross-border signing stopped being a legal bottleneck."</h3>
                        <p class="role">General Counsel</p>
                        <p class="text" data-i18n="test_card_5_text">Jurisdiction-aware workflows meant fewer
                            escalations to legal and faster turnaround.</p>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Testimonial Card 6 -->
                    <div class="testimonial-v2-card">
                        <div class="quote-icon">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="40" height="40">
                                <path fill="currentColor"
                                    d="M14.017 21L14.017 18C14.017 16.8954 14.9124 16 16.017 16H19.017C19.5693 16 20.017 15.5523 20.017 15V9C20.017 8.44772 19.5693 8 19.017 8H16.017C14.9124 8 14.017 7.10457 14.017 6V3H21.017V15C21.017 18.3137 18.3307 21 15.017 21H14.017ZM3 21L3 18C3 16.8954 3.89543 16 5 16H8C8.55228 16 9 15.5523 9 15V9C9 8.44772 8.55228 8 8 8H5C3.89543 8 3 7.10457 3 6V3H10V15C10 18.3137 7.31371 21 4 21H3Z" />
                            </svg>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="test_card_6_quote">"Exiting the platform isn’t a risk scenario anymore."</h3>
                        <p class="role">Procurement Director</p>
                        <p class="text" data-i18n="test_card_6_text">Our documents remain independently verifiable,
                            which changed how we evaluate long-term contracts.</p>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Testimonial Card 7 -->
                    <div class="testimonial-v2-card">
                        <div class="quote-icon">
                            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="40" height="40">
                                <path fill="currentColor"
                                    d="M14.017 21L14.017 18C14.017 16.8954 14.9124 16 16.017 16H19.017C19.5693 16 20.017 15.5523 20.017 15V9C20.017 8.44772 19.5693 8 19.017 8H16.017C14.9124 8 14.017 7.10457 14.017 6V3H21.017V15C21.017 18.3137 18.3307 21 15.017 21H14.017ZM3 21L3 18C3 16.8954 3.89543 16 5 16H8C8.55228 16 9 15.5523 9 15V9C9 8.44772 8.55228 8 8 8H5C3.89543 8 3 7.10457 3 6V3H10V15C10 18.3137 7.31371 21 4 21H3Z" />
                            </svg>
                        </div>
                        <h3 data-i18n="test_card_7_quote">"Security reviews focused on architecture, not promises."</h3>
                        <p class="role">CISO</p>
                        <p class="text" data-i18n="test_card_7_text">Zero-knowledge handling and verifiable audit trails
                            made approvals faster by reducing risk by design.</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>





    <section class="management-section reveal" id="resources">
        <div class="container">
            <div class="management-header">
                <h2>Easy to manage? <span>For sure.</span></h2>
                <div class="carousel-controls">
                    <button class="carousel-btn prev" id="prevBtn">❮</button>
                    <button class="carousel-btn next" id="nextBtn">❯</button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="management-carousel" id="carousel">
                <div class="carousel-track">
                    <div class="carousel-card active">
                        <div class="card-content">
                            <span class="card-category">ACCESS & FLEXIBILITY</span>
                            <h3>Access from anywhere</h3>
                            <p>On a laptop, phone, or tablet. From the city, beach, or the savanna.</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-image">
                            <img src="brillsign_access_anywhere_1769792518327.png" alt="Multiple devices">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="carousel-card">
                        <div class="card-content">
                            <span class="card-category">SHARING & COLLABORATION</span>
                            <h3>Send files instantly</h3>
                            <p>Share files and folders with anyone, fast, easy, and secure.</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-image">
                            <img src="brillsign_send_instantly_1769792536421.png" alt="Document sharing">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="carousel-card">
                        <div class="card-content">
                            <span class="card-category">ANALYTICS & INSIGHTS</span>
                            <h3>Real-time Tracking</h3>
                            <p>Know exactly when your documents are opened, viewed, and signed.</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-image">
                            <img src="brillsign_access_anywhere_1769792518327.png" alt="Tracking Dashboard">
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="carousel-card">
                        <div class="card-content">
                            <span class="card-category">SECURITY & COMPLIANCE</span>
                            <h3>Bank-grade Security</h3>
                            <p>AES-256 encryption and ISO 27001 certified data centers protect your data.</p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="card-image">
                            <img src="brillsign_send_instantly_1769792536421.png" alt="Security Shield">
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

          Solution

          This is an informational alert and so no changes are required.
      3. Retrieved from Cache (1)
        1. GET https://brillsign.com/
          Alert tags
          • WSTG-v42-ATHN-06
          • CWE-525
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          Alert description

          The content was retrieved from a shared cache. If the response data is sensitive, personal or user-specific, this may result in sensitive information being leaked. In some cases, this may even result in a user gaining complete control of the session of another user, depending on the configuration of the caching components in use in their environment. This is primarily an issue where caching servers such as "proxy" caches are configured on the local network. This configuration is typically found in corporate or educational environments, for instance.
          Other info

          The presence of the 'Age' header indicates that a HTTP/1.1 compliant caching server is in use.
          Request
          Request line and header section (228 bytes) 
          GET https://brillsign.com/ HTTP/1.1
host: brillsign.com
user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/141.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
pragma: no-cache
cache-control: no-cache
          Request body (0 bytes)
          Response
          Status line and header section (490 bytes) 
          HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Accept-Ranges: bytes
Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
Age: 1060224
Cache-Control: public, max-age=0, must-revalidate
Content-Disposition: inline
Content-Length: 82027

<html lang="en" data-theme="light">
